Automotive Engineering

Our Mission

MENU

Missions of Automotive Engineering Program is to graduate mechanical engineers who can;

work successfully in national and international companies as a manager or technical staff,

continue to Master and PhD programs to be ready to the academic world,

continuously improve themselves,

adapt quickly to the modern advanced technology systems,

be entrepreneur, innovator, researcher,

be respectful to ethical values.
